opinion.h: AMLIN ET AL., DOING BUSINESS AS AMLIN CARTAGE, ET AL. v. VERBEEM, DOING BUSINESS AS PETERS CARTAGE, ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE EASTERN DISTRICT OF
opinion.p: No. 881. Decided May 26, 1958. 154 F. Supp. 431, affirmed.
Wilhelmina Boersma and Wilber M. Brucker, Jr. for appellees.
The motion to affirm is granted and the judgment is affirmed.
